script_text: Great readers catch their own mistakes.
When something does not make sense, they stop and fix it.
Step one: stop when it feels off.
Step two: think. Does that word fit?
Step three: try again with the right word.
You read: the cat sat on the rug. But you said map.
Does a cat sit on a map? No! Stop, think, try again.
After each sentence, ask: did that make sense?
Now you are ready to self-correct while reading!
